system.description: Unleash a telekinetic blast at a target, knocking them prone and dealing damage. Can be sustained or widened at higher tiers.
Trap a target in a telekinetic vortex, holding them immobile and dealing repeated damage over several seconds.
Release a devastating explosion of telekinetic force, hurling all nearby enemies away and dealing heavy damage across a wide area.
Hurl your lightsaber at a distant target dealing energy damage. The attack strikes unerringly and the saber returns to your hand.
Hurl your lightsaber in a sweeping arc, striking up to three targets in sequence before returning to your hand.

Telekinetically crush an enemy with the full weight of the Force. Add 2 Difficulty to this attack (Destructive). This attack has Pierce equal to your ranks in the Force skill and the Sunder quality. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; on a successful Resilience check the target's damage is halved. On a failed attack roll, the attacker suffers 3 strain. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Unleash a bolt of Force lightning at a single target, dealing electrical damage. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure halves the damage. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Project a cone of electrical Force energy that strikes multiple enemies in front of you. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; failure halves the damage. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Summon a catastrophic storm of Force lightning that strikes all nearby enemies with massive electrical damage. Cannot be used while wearing armor. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Trigger painful spasms in a target's lungs, dealing damage. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; a successful Resilience check negates the power entirely. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Constrict a target's throat at range, dealing damage and reducing their physical capabilities (Disorient 2). Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; a successful Resilience check negates the power entirely. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Choke the life from an enemy, dealing massive damage and staggering the target. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; a successful Resilience check halves the damage and prevents the stagger. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Drain the life force from a single target, healing yourself for the wounds dealt after soak. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; a successful Resilience check halves the damage. Cannot be used while wearing armor. Does not affect droids. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

A single damage roll is applied to all nearby enemies. Heal yourself for the total wounds dealt across all targets after soak. Add Difficulty dice equal to the target's Resilience rank; a successful Resilience check halves the damage. Cannot be used while wearing armor. Does not affect droids. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Inflict a Force-induced poison that degrades all of the target's attributes over 3 rounds (Disorient 2). A successful Resilience check negates the effect entirely. Cannot be used while wearing armor. Does not affect droids or targets with Immunity: Poison. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

Release a Force-amplified scream dealing sonic damage in a forward arc (Blast 3, Disorient 1). A successful Resilience check halves the damage and negates the attribute penalty. Cannot be used while wearing armor. Does not affect droids. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

A more powerful Force Scream that expands into a full sphere, dealing greater sonic damage to all nearby enemies (Blast 5, Disorient 2). A successful Resilience check halves the damage and negates the attribute penalty. Cannot be used while wearing armor. Does not affect droids. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.

The ultimate Force Scream, dealing massive sonic damage and leaving all nearby enemies staggered and disoriented (Blast 5, Disorient 3, Stagger). A successful Resilience check halves the damage and negates the attribute penalty. Cannot be used while wearing armor. Does not affect droids. Dark Side power — add a Setback if Light Side aligned.
